description: Composition Green striped t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a U-neckline, has short sleeves, embroidered branding on the left chest and printed branding at the back Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with like colours Do not bleach, tumble, iron and dry clean This green striped t-shirt from puma with an uber cool chest print is a great summery choice. Team it with skinny jeans or denim shorts to make heads turn. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
